markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Onboard Marisol to a new role focused on company-wide documentation and training.](https://fathom.video/share/es4FovwPHueXwzABDr7D8qwZFsfnKzPW?tab=summary&timestamp=441.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New Role:** Marisol will lead company-wide documentation and training, starting next week after rolling off the Augment project.](https://fathom.video/share/es4FovwPHueXwzABDr7D8qwZFsfnKzPW?tab=summary&timestamp=295.0)
  - [**Primary Goal:** Enable the Strategy Sprints team to onboard ≥3 clients/week by March, up from the current 2/week limit.](https://fathom.video/share/es4FovwPHueXwzABDr7D8qwZFsfnKzPW?tab=summary&timestamp=441.0)
  - [**P1 Project:** Productize Marcel's strategic discovery process to empower Engagement Managers (EMs) and reduce reliance on key experts like Marcel and Ada.](https://fathom.video/share/es4FovwPHueXwzABDr7D8qwZFsfnKzPW?tab=summary&timestamp=608.0)
  - [**Long-Term Vision:** Build a scalable operating system to support the company's planned growth and new product launches.](https://fathom.video/share/es4FovwPHueXwzABDr7D8qwZFsfnKzPW?tab=summary&timestamp=1724.0)

## Topics

### The Problem: Growth is Constrained

  - [**Onboarding Bottleneck:** The Strategy Sprints team is limited to onboarding only two clients per week.](https://fathom.video/share/es4FovwPHueXwzABDr7D8qwZFsfnKzPW?tab=summary&timestamp=441.0)
      - [**Causes:**](https://fathom.video/share/es4FovwPHueXwzABDr7D8qwZFsfnKzPW?tab=summary&timestamp=1297.0)
          - [Lack of scalable documentation and training.](https://fathom.video/share/es4FovwPHueXwzABDr7D8qwZFsfnKzPW?tab=summary&timestamp=65.0)
          - [Over-reliance on key experts (Marcel, Ada, George) for all strategic work.](https://fathom.video/share/es4FovwPHueXwzABDr7D8qwZFsfnKzPW?tab=summary&timestamp=873.0)
          - [Understaffing (e.g., only one EM until last week).](https://fathom.video/share/es4FovwPHueXwzABDr7D8qwZFsfnKzPW?tab=summary&timestamp=1297.0)
  - [**Performance Gap:** The sprint-to-production conversion rate dropped to \~50% in November/December, far below the 85% plan.](https://fathom.video/share/es4FovwPHueXwzABDr7D8qwZFsfnKzPW?tab=summary&timestamp=546.0)
      - [**Cause:** A recent client conversion issue was addressed, but the team still lacks systems for early risk detection.](https://fathom.video/share/es4FovwPHueXwzABDr7D8qwZFsfnKzPW?tab=summary&timestamp=1366.0)
  - [**Documentation Chaos:** Essential knowledge is scattered and disorganized, creating a high-friction experience for new hires and forcing experts to answer repetitive questions.](https://fathom.video/share/es4FovwPHueXwzABDr7D8qwZFsfnKzPW?tab=summary&timestamp=143.0)

### The Solution: A Scalable Operating System

  - [**P1 Project: Productize Marcel's Strategic Discovery Process**](https://fathom.video/share/es4FovwPHueXwzABDr7D8qwZFsfnKzPW?tab=summary&timestamp=608.0)
      - [**Goal:** Enable EMs to conduct deep customer discovery and tailor strategy without direct input from Marcel or Ada.](https://fathom.video/share/es4FovwPHueXwzABDr7D8qwZFsfnKzPW?tab=summary&timestamp=608.0)
      - [**Deliverables:**](https://fathom.video/share/es4FovwPHueXwzABDr7D8qwZFsfnKzPW?tab=summary&timestamp=643.0)
          - [Video explanations from Marcel.](https://fathom.video/share/es4FovwPHueXwzABDr7D8qwZFsfnKzPW?tab=summary&timestamp=643.0)
          - [How-to guides for building the Airtable Content OS.](https://fathom.video/share/es4FovwPHueXwzABDr7D8qwZFsfnKzPW?tab=summary&timestamp=643.0)
          - [Structured kickoff questions to uncover client goals.](https://fathom.video/share/es4FovwPHueXwzABDr7D8qwZFsfnKzPW?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [**Long-Term Vision: Company-Wide Transformation**](https://fathom.video/share/es4FovwPHueXwzABDr7D8qwZFsfnKzPW?tab=summary&timestamp=1724.0)
      - [**Goal:** Build a scalable operating system to support the company's growth and new product launches.](https://fathom.video/share/es4FovwPHueXwzABDr7D8qwZFsfnKzPW?tab=summary&timestamp=1724.0)
      - [**Scope:**](https://fathom.video/share/es4FovwPHueXwzABDr7D8qwZFsfnKzPW?tab=summary&timestamp=965.0)
          - [Create role-specific training modules (e.g., for EMs, MEs).](https://fathom.video/share/es4FovwPHueXwzABDr7D8qwZFsfnKzPW?tab=summary&timestamp=965.0)
          - [Systematize workflows in a PM tool with triggers and reminders.](https://fathom.video/share/es4FovwPHueXwzABDr7D8qwZFsfnKzPW?tab=summary&timestamp=728.0)
          - [Build a new, structured onboarding experience for all employees.](https://fathom.video/share/es4FovwPHueXwzABDr7D8qwZFsfnKzPW?tab=summary&timestamp=1807.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Marisol:**](https://fathom.video/share/es4FovwPHueXwzABDr7D8qwZFsfnKzPW?tab=summary&timestamp=1213.0)
      - [Complete Augment project documentation and handoff this week.](https://fathom.video/share/es4FovwPHueXwzABDr7D8qwZFsfnKzPW?tab=summary&timestamp=295.0)
      - [Review pre-read materials before next Thursday's working session.](https://fathom.video/share/es4FovwPHueXwzABDr7D8qwZFsfnKzPW?tab=summary&timestamp=1482.0)
      - [Begin work on the P1 project next week.](https://fathom.video/share/es4FovwPHueXwzABDr7D8qwZFsfnKzPW?tab=summary&timestamp=1213.0)
  - [**George:**](https://fathom.video/share/es4FovwPHueXwzABDr7D8qwZFsfnKzPW?tab=summary&timestamp=1482.0)
      - [Share pre-read materials with Marisol (e.g., onboarding session video, Lovable strategy breakdown, sprint churn analysis).](https://fathom.video/share/es4FovwPHueXwzABDr7D8qwZFsfnKzPW?tab=summary&timestamp=1503.0)
      - [Find and share any existing documentation from Ada.](https://fathom.video/share/es4FovwPHueXwzABDr7D8qwZFsfnKzPW?tab=summary&timestamp=1915.0)
  - [**Ella:**](https://fathom.video/share/es4FovwPHueXwzABDr7D8qwZFsfnKzPW?tab=summary&timestamp=1482.0)
      - [Send the Figma workflow map to Marisol.](https://fathom.video/share/es4FovwPHueXwzABDr7D8qwZFsfnKzPW?tab=summary&timestamp=1892.0)
      - [Schedule a walkthrough of the Figma map with Marisol and Andy.](https://fathom.video/share/es4FovwPHueXwzABDr7D8qwZFsfnKzPW?tab=summary&timestamp=1892.0)
      - [Schedule the in-person working session for next Thursday.](https://fathom.video/share/es4FovwPHueXwzABDr7D8qwZFsfnKzPW?tab=summary&timestamp=1247.0)
